bird.name: Vanuatu imperial pigeon
bird.summary: The Vanuatu imperial pigeon or Baker's imperial pigeon (Ducula bakeri) is a species of bird in the family Columbidae. It is endemic to Vanu…

relations.subject: Vanuatu imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: Its habitat is mostly montane forests, and it also occurs in lowlands
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

relations.subject: Vanuatu imperial pigeon
relations.evidence: The population is probably declining since it is threatened by the clearing of forests for agriculture and hunting
relations.object_summary: 直接猎捕或误捕造成额外死亡。
